title: Guest Speaker — Google I/O Extended 2019
description: Presented "Introduction to Kotlin" at LUMS, covering Kotlin fundamentals and its advantages over Java in Android development. Organised by GDG Lahore.

title: Speaker — Tech Tology Lahore Chapter Launch
description: Presented on the enjoyable aspects of constructing Android applications, demystifying Android development for attendees.

title: Speaker — Tech Tology & Devenings
description: Delivered a presentation on Firebase services and their practical applications in real-world scenarios, highlighting how Firebase can be leveraged to build and scale applications efficiently while accelerating the overall development process.

title: Speaker — Minhaj University Lahore
description: Delivered a seminar on Programming Fundamentals, focusing on how programming concepts can be applied to solve real-world problems effectively.
